opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face feels like it's going to burst, and my lips are so huge and tight they are throbbing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden severe swelling of my lips and face over the last couple of hours.

symptom_narrative.onset: a mild aching in the lower lip about 4 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: marked swelling developing over the last 2 hours
symptom_narrative.character: tight, tense, burning swelling of the lips and face rather than itch
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe pressure and tension, very distressed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lips, right cheek and around the right eye — one side more than the other
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no hives, no belly cramps; not aware of shortness of breath
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: speech a bit muffled from the lip swelling

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, started a new tablet about 10 days ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives about 30 minutes from the nearest hospital

access_barriers.transport: about 30 minutes from the nearest emergency department

objective_data_offered.value: very swollen tight lips and right cheek/eye, one side worse; skin normal colour, no hives
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot examine inside the mouth/throat or assess the airway

objective_data_offered.value: breathing feels okay and I can speak in full sentences, but my words are muffled
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report; airway patency cannot be verified remotely and can change rapidly
